# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind Engagement Workflow Enhancements
- Summary: We've improved our engagement workflow by refining JSON handling for social media targets and adding robust URL verification. These updates ensure smoother content generation and deployment.
- Slug: engagement-workflow-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-engagement-workflow-improvements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-13-engagement-workflow-improvements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: Recent development efforts have focused on enhancing the internal tools that power our social media and engagement campaigns. Key improvements include more robust JSON handling for social media targets and the implementation of a `wait_for_public_url` function for better URL verification. These updates streamline the process of getting new content and features out to you.
- CTA: Learn more about our platform updates at CodeGrind!
- Visual brief: A clean, modern graphic representing a streamlined workflow or a simplified JSON structure, perhaps with a subtle nod to social media icons or a progress bar.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
